productDisplayName: John Players Men Striped Blue T-shirt
description: Style note Crafted from cotton knit, this polo T-shirt from john players is designed to offer exemplary comfort and style. The vibrant colour ups your energy factor, while the ribbed cuffs sit snug on well-toned arms. Team it with jeans and sneakers. Product Details Blue, white and grey striped polo neck T-shirt, has short sleeves with ribbed cuffs and chest buttoned placket Material and Care 100% polyester Machine wash cold using a mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry low and dry flat in shade inside out Warm iron Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size L
